name: Sermon Outline (OpenClaw Church)
tagline: Generate preach-ready sermon outlines with scripture references and applications.
description: Produces a sermon outline from a scripture passage or theme: Introduction, Main Points (each with scripture references), Applications, Conclusion. Every point has at least one verse citation; structure is ready for preaching. Default: ESV, Evangelical; plain text. For pastors and preachers. Related: Bible QA, Pastoral Prayer, Church Announcement skills by OpenClaw Church.
